case_title: MCCANN, KATHLEEN VS MORENO, SANTIAGO DEL TORRO et al

NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LAU, KAMING
CERT MAIL SENT TO SANTIAGO DEL TORRO MORENO RETURNED SIGNED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO MORENO, SANTIAGO DEL TORRO ET AL RETURNED TO COURT NO SUCH NUMBER.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MCCANN, KATHLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, SANTIAGO DEL TORRO LAU, KAMING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, SANTIAGO DEL TORRO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCANN, KATHLEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENO, SANTIAGO DEL TORRO LAU, KAMING $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,042.00, DEFT LAU, KAMING WAIVES DEFECTIVE CERTIFIED MAIL. DEFTS HAVE JOINT AND SEVERAL LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCANN, KATHLEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENO, SANTIAGO DEL TORRO LAU, KAMING $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,042.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 28050 ON 02/02/06 AND AMENDMENT TO JUDGMENT ON 02/17/06. APPELLANT SANTIAGO DEL TORRO MARENO TO PAY $5000 & APPELLANT KA-MING LAU TO PAY $42 COSTS. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28050, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
